abilities.name: Walking Tree
abilities.description: Indistinguishable from normal tree when not moving.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Tangling Roots (Enchanting) | AV: 7M (12M) | Rg: y2 or y4 in severe terrain | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Mask Entangle: After damaging, target Slow. Mask/Tome Entrench: Target gains Rooted Condition until end of next turn (no Walk/Charge, 3 damage if pushed).
(1) Germinate | Create area of thick vegetation counting as severe terrain anywhere within 8 yards. 3 yards diameter. Lasts indefinitely.
system.notes: Tree spirits of Malifaux. Typically non-violent. Roused to anger by destruction of forests by lumberjacks. Bound into service with eldritch magic. Thick bark resists damage. Force roots to entangle.
